tools.name: explain_auto
tools.title: Auto-detect class and explain
tools.description: Answer a CBSE/NCERT student question without knowing their class or subject in advance. The tutor infers the most likely class/subject and gives a level-appropriate explanation.

prompt.description: The student's question or topic in natural language.

tools.name: explain_topic
tools.title: Explain a CBSE/NCERT topic
tools.description: Get an exam-ready explanation of a specific topic or question for a CBSE/NCERT student (classes 9-12). Select class, subject, chapter, and ask a question.

stream.description: Stream for class 11/12: 'Science', 'Commerce', or 'Arts'. Leave empty for class 9/10.

chapter.description: Chapter or topic name from the NCERT syllabus.

prompt.description: The student's specific question or what they want explained.

length.description: Response depth: 'short' (~250 words), 'medium' (~600 words), 'detailed' (1500-2500+ words, exam-ready).

tools.name: explain_chapter
tools.title: Explain a full NCERT chapter
tools.description: Generate a complete NCERT-aligned study guide for a full chapter: concepts, formulas, derivations, worked examples, NCERT exercise solutions, and revision notes.

stream.description: Stream for class 11/12: 'Science', 'Commerce', or 'Arts'. Leave empty for class 9/10.

chapter.description: Chapter name from the NCERT syllabus.

length.description: Response depth. 'detailed' produces a full textbook-style chapter (1500-2500+ words).

tools.name: explain_from_document
tools.title: Explain uploaded study material
tools.description: Given the plain-text content of a student's academic material (extracted from a PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, or pasted notes), produce a clear, textbook-style explanation. Optionally answer a specific question about the material.

content.description: The extracted plain-text content of the student's uploaded material (up to ~80k chars).

question.description: Optional specific question about the material.
